title: Sample Contract Review
instructions: Review the attached documents and produce a risk memo. Output: `risk-memo.docx`

criteria.title: Identifies termination notice period
criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the memo identifies that either party may terminate on thirty days written notice. FAIL otherwise.

criteria.title: Identifies payment deadline
criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the memo identifies that invoices are payable within fifteen days. FAIL otherwise.
